query:
SELECT cv.id, cv.userId, cv.type, cv.titre, cv.visibleCVtheque, cv.createdAt,
       u.id as user_id_in_users, u.name as user_name, u.email
FROM cv_documents cv
LEFT JOIN users u ON cv.userId = u.id
WHERE cv.userId = 60001
LIMIT 10;
